targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_ledger WHERE status='published' AND published_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='published')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) * 100, 1) FROM content_ledger WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE status='active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE status='banned'
SELECT date_trunc('hour', published_at) as time, COUNT(*) as count FROM content_ledger WHERE published_at >= now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT platform, COUNT(*) as count FROM content_ledger WHERE status='published' GROUP BY platform

SELECT a.username, a.platform, a.status, COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.status='published') as published, COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.status='failed') as failed FROM accounts a LEFT JOIN content_ledger cl ON a.id = cl.account_id AND cl.created_at >= now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY a.id, a.username, a.platform, a.status ORDER BY a.platform, a.username

SELECT pt.id, pt.platform, a.username, pt.error_message, pt.retry_count, pt.created_at FROM publish_tasks pt JOIN accounts a ON pt.account_id = a.id WHERE pt.status = 'failed' ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC LIMIT 20
